name: Pheasant Country Golf Course
about: Pheasant Country Golf Course is a premier 18-hole, par-71 public golf course located in South Heart, North Dakota, newly renovated in 2024. The facility features an indoor golf simulator, a full-service pro shop, and Birdies Bar & Grill, offering a complete golf and dining experience. It is listed among the 20 Must-Play Courses on the Lewis and Clark Golf Trail and is known for its scenic views around the Heart River, updated amenities like GPS-equipped carts and on-course bathrooms, and a welcoming atmosphere suitable for various skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Indoor golf simulator available for year-round play
On-course GPS-equipped carts for enhanced gameplay
Family-friendly atmosphere with a full-service restaurant and bar
Host of adult and youth golf leagues and clinics
Renovated course with modern amenities and scenic views

food_and_drink.notes: Full dining service available at Birdies Bar & Grill with a family-friendly indoor setting and patio.
Full-service bar with happy hour available from 3-6pm.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While the venue does not specify if rentals are available, it is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink policies are not specified; however, the venue has a full-service restaurant and bar on-site.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify the average time for 18 holes, but it is a standard par-71 course.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Pheasant Country Golf Course offers youth golf clinics and is described as having a family-friendly atmosphere with a patio and indoor dining options.
